speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.summary: Powell held an FOMC press conference maintaining the federal funds rate at 3.5%-3.75% while signaling flexibility to hike or cut based on incoming data amid Middle East uncertainty.

speeches.name: Lorie Logan
speeches.summary: Logan issued a statement on FOMC dissent following the April 28-29 meeting, indicating potential disagreement with the rate decision.

macro_fred.narrative: Leaning Neutral: CPI at 3.3%, Fed Funds at 3.64%, unemployment at 4.3%.
